shared_properties: Backdrop covers the full 320x180 internal playfield and is designed for a 4x upscale to 1280x720 output.
Core palette metadata remains primary #3B3347, background #0D0D0F, and accent #E07B39 while local shadow colors stay inside specs.colors_hex.
Vertical composition keeps the center lane open so player and hazard silhouettes remain readable during downward camera motion.
differences: Three parallax depth bands use #0D0D0F, #1A1A2E, and #3B3347 to build a claustrophobic shaft with long chained silhouettes.
Sparse window slits and dripping stone highlights occupy fewer than 9% of total pixels to keep the scene dark.
No progress markers, depth numbers, or minimap motifs appear anywhere in the backdrop.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the downward-only camera framing, 320x180 internal render target, and no-progress-bar tension described by the GDD.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the oppressive abyss palette, vertical shaft silhouettes, and pixel-art dungeon mood for the full-screen background.

reference_images.label: player_concept
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the player readability target so the backdrop never overpowers the 16x24 prisoner silhouette.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle for parallax backdrops and TilemapChunk-backed textures for reusable 16x16 surface modules.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world textures before gameplay, cache tile indices for high, medium, and low friction surfaces, and keep shaft layer handles in a WorldVisualRegistry resource.
runtime_notes: Render the shaft backdrop from an offscreen 320x180 target and upscale by an integer factor of 4 to preserve pixel integrity.
Move parallax layers at 0.4x camera speed and keep their anchors fixed to the downward-only camera model.
Treat one-way ledges and exit gates as separate gameplay entities even when they share world art atlases.

context.usage: Primary shaft background rendered behind all tiles, hazards, and UI.

composition: Parallax band 1 occupies the full canvas in #0D0D0F.
Parallax band 2 adds 6-8 vertical stone columns using #1A1A2E and #3B3347.
Decorative highlights occupy under 9% of total pixels and avoid the top 8 px HUD area.

acceptance_criteria: Backdrop is exactly 320x180 px and intended for integer 4x upscale without introducing sub-pixel details.
At least 65% of all non-transparent pixels use #0D0D0F or #1A1A2E to preserve the oppressive low-key mood.
The upper-left 64x16 px and upper-right 64x16 px regions remain visually quiet so HP and timer UI stay legible.
